chunks.text: Student Award: Jim and Donna Gray Endowment Award | EECS at UC Berkeley Jim and Donna Gray Endowment Award The Jim and Donna Gray scholarship is awarded to computer science students completing their junior year who have demonstrated both high scholastic achievement and financial need. Those eligible are juniors and seniors with a GPA of 3.3 or above. This academic year award honors Professor Emeritus Michael A. Harrison. The Department makes the nominations and the winners are selected in the *fall*. No nominations are solicited for this award. (Formerly called IT Award, name changed in 2008.) Awardees 2024-2025 Alexander Smith, Alexander Vetter, Peter Wang, Phoenix Wilson, Rachel Xiao, Brandon Xu, Katrina Zhu 2023-2024 Ayla Aeress, Di Bao, Kathleen Ge, Julia Isaac, Jingzhi Su, Kiran Suresh, JJ Yu 2022-2023 Hyeonhee Lee, Mike Martinez, Alex Nguyen, Roshan Parekh, Jaeden Quintana, Huy Tran, Stephanie Wong 2021-2022 Ishaan Dham, Anisa Ibnat, Sean Kim, Terrance Li, Maximus Santosa, Stephanie Trinh, Ufuoma-Oghene Uvieghara 2020-2021 Zhuowen Chen, Victor Ho, Nicholas Lee, Benjamin Liao, Mathilde McKeever, Shirley Nguyen, Amber White 2019-2020 Jazzly Anderson, Oscar Chan, Vidur Maheshwari, Alan Pham, April Sin, Candyce Xu, Tianlun Zhang 2018-2019 Rayan Maher Al Atab, Ho Yin Chau, Jamie Gu, Moses Kim, Khang T Ly, Sarah Young, Junyi Zhu 2017-2018 Andrew Campbell, Jacqueline Forsberg, Daniel Ho, Justin Hong, Denis Li, Young Lin, Harley Patton 2016-2017 Kaylee Burns, Betty Chang, Andy Chau, Benjamin Kha, Ann Lai, Rohit Lalchandani, Nicholas Ward 2015-2016 James Steven Carlson, Jimmy Yun Cheung, Kegan Kawamura, Yishuang Liang, Robert Mason Spark,
